The '''Riddle Eight computer spike''' was a type of [[Computer spike/Legends|computer spike]] that was [[MicroThrust computer spike|produced]] by [[MicroThrust Processors]]. It cost 12,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="CRFG" /> It was used to sift through encrypted data files onboard the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']].
